scripts.build: astro build && npx pagefind --site dist --output-path dist/pagefind
scripts.data:parse: node scripts/parse-localisation.mjs && node scripts/parse-common.mjs && node scripts/parse-events.mjs && node scripts/merge-entities.mjs
scripts.data:all: npm run data:parse && npm run data:build
scripts.deploy: npm run data:all && npm run build
